last_feedback.suggested_fix: Ensure that all parent outputs are always derived from child function calls or parent inputs. For commands not executed, consider returning a default result from a child function (e.g., a 'no-op' result) instead of None literals.

return_value_origin.detail: Return values cancel_result, place_result, track_result are set to None literals when the corresponding command is not executed. These None values are not derived from child functions or parent inputs, violating the rule that business values must originate from child outputs or parent inputs.

child_coverage.detail: All child functions (ParseCommand, PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder) are directly called in the parent code.

no_direct_access.detail: No direct reads or writes to global variables or data sources; all data operations go through child function calls.

no_cross_calls.detail: No child calls another child; all calls are from parent to children.

dataflow_conformance.detail: All declared dataflow edges are realized: parent input to ParseCommand, ParseCommand outputs to parent, parent order_data to each order child, and each order child result to parent.
